api_telemetry.description: Skill/function usage tracking. GET returns telemetry entries with summary. POST records new usage event.

api_diagnostics.description: System health diagnostics. Returns VPS health, connector health, telemetry health with status badges.

api_proxy_connector.description: Chat↔V2 round-trip relay. Routes connector actions, emits skills_changed events for mutations, records telemetry on every call.

page_telemetry.description: Live telemetry dashboard with summary cards, sortable skill table, connector-level aggregation. Tabs: By Skill, By Connector.

page_diagnostics.description: System health dashboard with overall banner (healthy/degraded/down), per-section status cards, 30s auto-refresh.

chat_status_bar.description: Compact status bar in ChatHeader. Shows: VPS health dot (green/yellow/red), active V2 session count, quick nav to /telemetry and /diagnostics. Auto-refreshes every 60s.

architecture.round_trip_loop: Chat → /api/proxy/connector → routeNeptuneAction() → recordUsage() → skills_changed event → V2 notification
architecture.data_flow: Skill execution → annotation-collector → usage-telemetry → /api/telemetry → dashboard UI
architecture.health_monitoring: ChatStatusBar → /api/diagnostics (60s poll) → VPS/connector/telemetry checks → visual indicators
architecture.event_bus: skills_changed event type emitted by proxy/connector for mutation actions, consumed by annotation loop (PB-D)

upstash_integration.note: In-memory telemetry store active. Upstash Redis persistence ready when REDIS_URL secret is configured. usage-telemetry.ts interface supports swap to persisted store.

next_phases.PB-C: Formalize connectors/neptune/ structure — migrate scattered skills, update master-registry.json
next_phases.PB-D: Annotation loop — wire annotation-collector to every run_workflow/execute_skill, weekly digest cron
next_phases.Phase 10: Prompt upgrade + master synthesis — system prompt rewrite, master proof JSON 15KB+

GET /api/telemetry.response: { entries: TelemetryEntry[], summary: TelemetrySummary, timestamp, filters }

GET /api/diagnostics.response: { status: healthy|degraded|down, timestamp, sections: DiagnosticSection[], summary }

POST /api/proxy/connector.response: { success, result?, error?, durationMs, event?: { type: skills_changed, ... }, timestamp }

integration_map.usage-telemetry.ts: connectors/neptune/functions/ — in-memory Map<string, TelemetryEntry> — wired to POST /api/telemetry
integration_map.annotation-collector.ts: connectors/neptune/functions/ — in-memory Annotation[] — feeds PB-D annotation loop
integration_map.neptune_client.ts: connectors/neptune/ — SKILL_REGISTRY (8 connectors, 200 actions) — used by diagnostics
integration_map.chat_status_bar: components/chat/ — polls /api/diagnostics every 60s — renders in ChatHeader
integration_map.nav_admin: components/sidebar/ — Telemetry + Diagnostics links in Admin group

cardinal_compliance.J_no_grep_without_router: All API routes are standalone endpoints — no grep bypass
cardinal_compliance.6a153d63_no_pm2: No VPS Python edits or pm2 reloads in this phase
cardinal_compliance.6a273f70_vercel_rest_only: No vercel CLI usage — all deploy via REST API patterns
cardinal_compliance.shadcn_only: All UI uses shadcn/ui primitives: Card, Button, Badge, Skeleton, Tabs
